rows.body: Hi {{first_name}}, Mykoal DeShazo with Adaxa Home (NMLS 1912347). You asked about a HELOC at smartr8.com. I can pull your options together with no credit pull. Reply STOP to opt out, HELP for help.
{{first_name}}, a HELOC lets you tap your equity without touching your first mortgage rate. Want me to see what you qualify for? Just reply here.
Lots of folks use a HELOC for renovations or to pay off higher interest debt, {{first_name}}. Tell me your goal and let us run your numbers.

rows.subject: Smart ways people use a HELOC
rows.preheader: Renovations, debt payoff, and a flexible safety net.
rows.body:
A HELOC is flexible, so people put it to work in different ways. Some fund a renovation or addition. Others pay off higher interest balances to simplify. Many keep a standby line ready for emergencies.

Not sure which fits? That is what I am here for. Reply and tell me your goal.
{{first_name}}, a HELOC can also sit as a standby safety net you only tap if you need it. Happy to walk you through how it works.
Still thinking it over, {{first_name}}? No pressure. When you are ready I can show your HELOC options in minutes. Reply STOP to opt out.

rows.subject: Still here when you are ready, {{first_name}}
rows.preheader: Your HELOC options are a quick conversation away.
rows.body:
No rush at all. When you want to see what your equity could do, I can put your HELOC options together quickly with no credit pull to start.

Call or text me anytime at (480) 206 9290.
{{first_name}}, I will keep your HELOC request on file. Reach me anytime at (480) 206 9290. Reply STOP to opt out. Mykoal.
